architectReview.evidence: Leader audit confirms the blocker story delivered the exact missing review-lane outcome: fresh architect-style evaluation plus executor-style QA evidence for G002, grounded in current repo state and tied to live DB-backed verification artifacts.

executorQa.evidence: The blocker-resolution story produced a fresh command report, a structured embedded-Postgres verifier artifact, and a checkpointable G002 quality gate that was immediately accepted by `gjc ultragoal checkpoint` when G002 was returned to active and then completed.
e2eCommands: gjc ultragoal checkpoint --goal-id G002 --status complete --evidence ... --quality-gate-json artifacts/g005-quality-gate.json --json
redTeamCommands: Use a fresh embedded Postgres database so prior local state cannot mask missing lineage behavior.
Verify the repeat worker run stays unchanged instead of silently creating duplicate revisions.
Prove the new quality gate is strong enough by using it to complete the formerly review-blocked G002 story.

artifactRefs.description: Fresh current-state verification log for the G002 blocker-resolution story.
Structured live verifier output for repeated worker ingest and indicator upsert behavior.
Checkpointable quality gate used to complete the formerly review-blocked G002 story.

contractCoverage.obligation: Produce clean architect/executor QA evidence that is strong enough to unblock and complete G002.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: embedded-postgres verifier artifacts + ultragoal G002 reactivation/completion receipts

adversarialCases.scenario: Apply the new blocker-resolution quality gate to the previously review-blocked G002 story.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: G002 can be reactivated and then completed without further blocker findings.

iteration.evidence: The blocker story started because earlier subagent receipts were unusable. This rerun replaced that missing evidence with fresh current-state artifacts and immediately proved sufficiency by completing G002.
rerunCommands: gjc ultragoal checkpoint --goal-id G002 --status complete --evidence ... --quality-gate-json artifacts/g005-quality-gate.json --json
